overview_table.Features: Lingering Light Photonic Reflexes Ability Improvement
Vergence Angles III Evincer Lens Feature

features.name: Harmonic Battlecasting
features.description:
As an Evincer, you are able to prepare and cast spells from the Harmonic
spell list:

- **Spells Prepared.** At 1st Rank, you may prepare 4 spells for this
  Class at the end of each long rest. You may cast those prepared spells
  using this feature.

- **Class Circle Cap.** Each spell you prepare may have a maximum
  baseline Circle of 1st Circle.

- **Heightening.** When you cast spells using this feature, you may
  heighten spells up to your Class Circle Cap.

- **Spell Points.** At 1st Rank, you gain 2 Spell Points. When you cast
  spells using this feature, you must expend Spell Points equal to the
  Circle of the spell. Spell Points are regained at the end of each long
  rest.

- **Spellcasting Modifier.** Your spellcasting modifier when casting
  spells using this feature is CHA.

  - **Your Spell Attack Bonus** = your CHA + your Tier Bonus

  - **Your Spell Save DC** = 8 + your CHA + your Tier Bonus

  - **Spellcasting Checks** made with spells prepared for this class use
    your CHA.

- **Signature Spell.** Your designated signature spell may be one of the
  1st Circle or higher spells prepared for this feature.

- **Higher Ranks.** At higher Ranks, the spells prepared, Spell Points,
  and Class Circle Cap all improve as described in the Class Overview
  Table.

features.name: Evincer Lens
features.flavor_text: You peek behind the curtain with a cracked eye, giving form to synesthetic insight. Raindrops of light trickle in with a photoelectric giddiness as you unwind the truths of the universe.
features.description:
At 1st Rank, you choose an Evincer Lens to focus your power and filter
your perception of the universe. You gain features from your chosen
Evincer Lens at 1st, 4th, and 8th Rank.

features.name: Lightspeed
features.flavor_text: A sliver of aberrant light reaches through the cacophony of the many worlds, falling within your grasp and scattered as paint in a tempest. The boundaries of time and space lose their ground in the presence of a novel power.
features.description:
At 1st Rank, once per round, if your Speed is greater than 0, you may
take an action to teleport to a target unoccupied space within a
distance equal to your Speed.

Additionally, each time you cause you or any other creature to teleport
in any way (such as your **Lightspeed** and **Vergence** features, or
any spell that allows you to teleport), you gain a *lightspeed charge*
for each creature teleported that you can use to activate *lightforms.*
At the start and end of combat, all lightspeed charges are lost.

## Lightforms Known

At 1st Rank, you know the **Flashbang** lightform described below, as
well as one from your Evincer Lens.

### Flashbang

1st Rank Evincer Lightform

Once per round when you hit with a weapon attack, you may expend a
lightspeed charge to convert all of the damage to **radiant** and deal
an additional **Xd4 damage**, where X is your Evincer Rank. If this
damage breaks the target's ST, they are disoriented until
the end of their next turn.

features.name: Vergence I
features.flavor_text: The infinitude of reality folds upon itself in uncountable dimensionality and symmetry. Through a flash of mere intuition, consequence itself can join and bifurcate.
features.description:
At 2nd Rank, twice per rest, as a reaction when a target ally within 30
feet is dealt damage, you may teleport to the nearest unoccupied space
from them of your choosing and then produce the following effects:

- **Convergence.** You **regain 2 ST** for each ally within 15 feet of
  you. This amount per ally increases as you gain Evincer Ranks, as
  shown in the Class Overview Table.

- **Divergence.** You redirect half of the damage to be dealt to you
  instead.

Your effects that occur immediately after you teleport, such as
**Convergence** and **Divergence**, are *vergence effects* and may be
produced in any order you choose.

features.name: Vergence Angles I
features.flavor_text: Each facet and perspective skews the outcome.
features.description:
At 2nd Rank, select one of the following Vergence Angle features from
the list below, which enhance the capabilities of your **Vergence**
feature. During the Retrain downtime activity, you may redo the
selection of all of your chosen Vergence Angles.

### Mirroring

2nd Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, you cause the source of the damage to become
disoriented until the start of its next turn.

### Parallax

2nd Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, you and the target ally may immediately travel up
to 10 feet.

### Refraction

2nd Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, you may grant the target ally **DB 5** against
**supernatural damage** until the end of the current turn. At
4th/7th/10th Rank, this DB becomes 10/15/20, respectively.

features.name: Lingering Light
features.flavor_text: Glowing and red, the designation of focus fire is drawn upon your foe.
features.description:
At 3rd Rank, you learn the following lightform:

### Lingering Light

3rd Rank Evincer Lightform

Once on your turn as a free action, you may expend two lightspeed
charges to leave a *lingering mark* on any target you hit with an attack
during your turn. The next attack by a creature other than you against
each target with a lingering mark gains advantage on the attack check.
Each lingering mark lasts until the target is attacked or until the
start of your next turn.

features.name: Photonic Reflexes
features.flavor_text: When the time comes to take action, you are action incarnate.
features.description:
At 3rd Rank, during your first turn of combat, your Speed is doubled and
if you use your **Lightspeed** teleport, your initiative partner may add
15 feet to their movement pool.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 3rd, 6th, and 9th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time
you gain an Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent +1 increases
to your ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier
multiple times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your
character's Level. The maximum is +5 at Level 3, increases to +6 at
Level 6, and finally becomes +7 at Level 9.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 4th, 7th, and 10th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Evincer being
the exploring Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the
following benefit:

- **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Evincer and gain one
  Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Evincer Lens Feature
features.description: At 4th Rank, you gain a feature for your Evincer Lens.

features.name: Vergence Angles II
features.flavor_text: You hone the vibrant light that suffuses every flash of steel and stride through space.
features.description:
At 5th Rank, select one of the following Vergence Angle features from
the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain
downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen
Vergence Angles.

### Brightness

5th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, on the next time you use **Flashbang** before the
end of combat, you may add the damage you redirected to yourself to the
damage dealt by the **Flashbang** attack.

### Hue

*5th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle*

When you redirect damage to yourself using **Divergence**, you may
change the damage type of that damage to a different one of your
choosing.

### Saturation

5th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, if the damage you redirected to yourself using
**Divergence** causes you to break your ST, you regain the reaction
taken to use **Vergence**.

features.name: Blueshift
features.flavor_text: Cerulean lifelines are thrown to your allies, speeding up their getaway.
features.description:
At 6th Rank, you learn the following lightform:

### Blueshift

6th Rank Evincer Lightform

Once on your turn as a free action, you may expend three lightspeed
charges to choose a target creature within 15 feet of you to become
*tethered* to you. That creature may also choose a creature within 15
feet of them to become tethered as well. Each subsequent creature may
repeat this process until no creature is chosen, then each tethered
creature may immediately travel up to a number of feet equal to 10 × the
number of tethered creatures.

features.name: Vergence II
features.flavor_text: Spacetime stamina-building makes for longer and more frequent jaunts.
features.description:
At 6th Rank, you may now use your **Vergence** feature three times per
rest. Additionally, you may use **Vergence** if the target ally is
within 45 feet of you.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 6th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an
Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent +1 increases to your
ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple
times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your
character's Level. The maximum is +5 at Level 3, increases to +6 at
Level 6, and finally becomes +7 at Level 9.

features.name: Photonic Leap
features.flavor_text: Being ambushed would require causality not to be constantly in your favor.
features.description:
At 7th Rank, when you make an Initiate check as the initiative leader,
you may add +5 to the total. If your combat team takes initiative first,
you are the initiative leader, and you use your **Lightspeed** teleport
during your first turn, you may allow your initiative partner to also
teleport to an unoccupied space within your Reach.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 7th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Evincer being the exploring
Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following
benefit:

- **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Evincer and gain one
  Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Vergence Angles III
features.flavor_text: The true essence of what you have become is now harmonic and coherent.
features.description:
At 8th Rank, select one of the following Vergence Angle features from
the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain
downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen
Vergence Angles.

### Exchange

8th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

When you teleport to the target ally using **Vergence**, you may occupy
their space and cause them to teleport to occupy the space you just
left.

### Interference

8th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, you may make a light weapon attack against the
source of the damage.

### Non-Locality

8th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

When you **regain ST** using **Convergence**, you may cause the target
ally to **regain the ST** instead of yourself.

features.name: Evincer Lens Feature
features.description: At 8th Rank, you gain a feature for your Evincer Lens.

features.name: Vergence III
features.flavor_text: Space folds most willingly for you, easing your travel.
features.description:
At 9th Rank, you may now use your **Vergence** feature four times per
rest. Additionally, you may use **Vergence** if the target ally is
within 60 feet of you.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 9th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an
Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent +1 increases to your
ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple
times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your
character's Level. The maximum is +5 at Level 3, increases to +6 at
Level 6, and finally becomes +7 at Level 9.

features.name: Solar Ray
features.flavor_text: A drop of golden sun can burn skin. You open a floodgate of ultraviolet, ultraviolent light.
features.description:
At 10th Rank, you learn the following lightform:

### Solar Ray

10th Rank Evincer Lightform

Once on your turn as an action, you may expend four lightspeed charges
to cause all creatures in a 60 foot long, 15 foot wide line originating
in front of you to become *sunburned* and be dealt **8d6 radiant
damage**. Sunburned creatures are disoriented until the
end of their next turn and set ablaze.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 10th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Evincer being the exploring
Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following
benefit:

- **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Evincer and gain one
  Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Photonic Focus
features.flavor_text: You and your ally form an acute vertex of precision fire.
features.description:
At 11th Rank, once per turn, you may designate a target. Both you and
your initiative partner gain advantage on the first attack check made
this turn against that target.

features.name: Vergence Angles IV
features.flavor_text: Sundered by the glory of stars ripping through it, your form is now the perforated map of the universe's power.
features.description:
At 11th Rank, select one of the following Vergence Angle features from
the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain
downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen
Vergence Angles.

### Aurora

11th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

When you **regain ST** using **Convergence**, you may instead **heal
HP** by half the amount.

### Unity

*11th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle*

When you redirect damage to yourself using **Divergence**, you may
redirect all of the damage dealt to yourself instead of half. If you do,
the **ST regained** from **Convergence** is doubled.

### Zenith

11th Rank Evincer Vergence Angle

As a vergence effect, you may cast a spell with a casting time of one
action using your **Battlecasting** or **Spellcasting** features as a
free action.

features.name: Lodestar
features.flavor_text: You blaze forth in a prismatic beam, living light that reflects off the geometry of the universe's hidden fractals.
features.description:
At 12th Rank, you learn the following lightform:

### Lodestar

12th Rank Evincer Lightform

Once on your turn as an action, you may expend five lightspeed charges
to travel up to 30 feet in a straight line five times, ending in the
space you started, drawing a path of five lines connected to five
points. You may move through spaces occupied by creatures, but not
through obstructions.

Creatures in spaces that intersect the path drawn by your movement are
subjected to your choice of any or all of the following effects:

- **Red.** They gain a lingering mark from **Lingering Light**.

- **Blue.** They become tethered by **Blueshift**.

- **Violet.** They become sunburned by **Solar Ray**.

features.name: Final Reach
features.description:
When you reach character Level 12, you compute your *Total Rank*, which
is calculated as:

###### The sum of all of your Class Ranks

If your Total Rank is less than 16 when you reach Level 12, then for
each deficient Rank, you may choose one of the benefits below to modify
a feature granted by one of your Class Ranks:

- **Maneuvers.** You learn two additional maneuvers.

- **Battlecasting.** You gain a maneuver, an additional Spell Point, and
  an additional prepared spell for that Class.

- **Spellcasting.** You gain three additional Spell Points and three
  additional prepared spells for that Class.

Subclasses

features.name: Evincer Lens: Breakneck
features.flavor_text: The wind rushing by your ears becomes a steady hum, the horizon moves closer to you, and space seems to envelop you as you push the boundaries of movement. From your perspective, it seems less like you're moving fast and more like other things are moving more slowly, the distances between objects shrinking to make traversal trivial. To others, you might as well be in two places at once.
features.description:
## Supersonic

*Arcs of errant lightning ripple through your body as you begin to bolt.
Discarded energy wisps in your wake while you outrun the consequences.*

At 1st Rank, once per rest as a free action, you may become
*supersonic*. While you are supersonic, each time you take a Move
action, you gain one lightspeed charge.

At the end of each of your turns while supersonic, if you have not used
the **Accelerate** lightform (listed below) during that turn, you cease
being supersonic and *burn out*. Burning out causes you to fall
prone and deal **2d6 lightning damage** to all creatures
and objects other than yourself within 10 feet of you**.** This damage
increases to 4d6/6d6/8d6 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

At the end of combat, you may cease being supersonic without burning
out.

## Accelerate

*You push everything from your mind, disregard the physical toll, and
will yourself to run.*

At 1st Rank, you learn the **Accelerate** lightform described below:

### Accelerate

Breakneck Evincer Lightform

As a free action while you are supersonic, you may expend a lightspeed
charge to increase your Speed by 10 feet until you are no longer
supersonic. This effect may stack onto itself up to five times. Each use
of this lightform increases its lightspeed charge cost by 1 until you
are no longer supersonic.

## Twister Trail

*Zig-zagging through the battlefield, stirring up whirlwinds along the
way.*

At 4th Rank, when you use **Vergence** while supersonic, you may choose
not to teleport and instead travel up to your Speed if at the end of
this movement you are within 5 feet of the target ally. At the end of
your movement, vergence effects still trigger as if you had teleported.

Each creature of your choice within your Reach of the path you traveled
during this movement is pushed 10 feet upwards and becomes
stuck in the air until the end of their next turn, at
which point they fall prone.

## Slipstream

*Finding purchase on even the frictionless grooves of space itself.*

At 8th Rank, you gain the following benefits:

- **Hyperspeed.** Your **Accelerate** feature increases your Speed by 15
  feet rather than 10 feet.

- **Supersonic Boom.** When you burn out, instead of falling
  prone you may travel 10 feet immediately before dealing
  the burn out damage. Creatures that take the burn out damage fall
  prone.

- **Tornado Alley.** Creatures stuck by **Twister Trail**
  are instead restrained.

features.name: Evincer Lens: Fractureforged
features.flavor_text: Glimpses of the true nature of the universe come to many in the form of slivers of light, ripples in water, and patterns of sand. Pulling from the pattern, you extract shards of raw potential from imperceptible corners of the empty space around you. These seemingly colorless prisms need just the right angle of light to produce the most brilliant hues.
features.description:
## Fractal Armament

*You crack the edge of reality into cosmic needles.*

At 1st Rank, as a free action, you may conjure a *fractal armament*
which is a weapon purposed for any melee fighting style that is
immediately held by either you or an ally within 15 feet of you. It has
the following properties:

- **Fragile.** Weapon attacks that hit using the fractal armament cause
  it to be destroyed afterwards. Otherwise, it lasts until the end of
  your next turn or it is unattended.

- **Glass Spear.** As an action, a creature holding the fractal armament
  may make a ranged special attack using your CHA against a target
  within 30 feet of them, after which the weapon is destroyed. On a hit,
  the target is dealt **2d8 piercing damage**. This damage becomes
  4d8/6d8/8d8 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

## Stained Glass

*The fault lines fuse as you align the crystal's form to produce a
single, tuned wavelength.*

At 1st Rank, you learn the **Stained Glass** lightform described below:

### Stained Glass

Fractureforged Evincer Lightform

As an action, you may expend a lightspeed charge you may grant a *color*
chosen from below to one of your fractal armaments that does not yet
have a color:

- **Red.** Target is dealt an additional **3d4 fire damage** and is set
  ablaze.

- **Orange.** Target is dealt an additional **2d4 force damage** and is
  stuck until the end of their next turn.

- **Yellow.** Target is dealt an additional **1d4 psychic damage** and
  is frightened until the end of their next turn.

- **Green.** Target is dealt an additional **2d4 acid damage** and is
  poisoned until the end of their next turn.

Weapon attacks that hit using your fractal armaments and **Glass Spear**
hits apply the used fractal armament's color's effect to the target.

## In Case of Emergency

*When your glass facade is struck, a brilliant backlight illuminates
through the cracks.*

At 4th Rank, as a vergence effect, you may perform your **Stained
Glass** lightform as a free action. Additionally, you gain a new color
option for your **Stained Glass** feature:

- **Blue.** Choosing this option costs one additional lightspeed charge.
  Target is dealt an additional **3d4 cold damage** and is
  restrained until the end of their next turn.

## Iridescent Arsenal

*Whistling snaps crackle through the air as weapon after weapon is
pulled from the shattered veil.*

At 8th Rank, you gain the following benefits:

- **Kaleidoscope.** You may use **Stained Glass** on two fractal
  armaments with one action, spending the necessary charges for both.

- **Prism.** You gain a new color option for your **Stained Glass**
  feature:

- **Violet.** Choosing this option costs one additional lightspeed
    charge. Target is dealt an additional **3d4 necrotic damage** and is
    incapacitated until the end of their next turn.

features.name: Evincer Lens: Timetorn
features.flavor_text: Embracing the severed streams of consequence and missed opportunities, you fall through the labyrinths of time searching for the rare path forward. Caught between always and every time at once, your anchor to the world - your allies and your family - is the last thing you have to hold onto. It's something worth fighting for, time after time.
features.description:
## Temporal Jaunt

*Ripping through the fabric of space and time, you will have faced your
future problems.*

At 1st Rank, once per rest as an action, you may roll a d4 and record
its outcome: you gain that number of lightspeed charges, and after that
many rounds of combat end, your *past self* appears at a target
unoccupied space within 30 feet of you (your *present self*) and may
take a turn when your combat team takes initiative:

- **Identity.** Your past self and your present self both count as the
  same creature, except in two locations.

- **Causality.** If your past self becomes affected by any effect, your
  present self immediately becomes affected the same way. Your present
  self may be affected twice if both selves are caught by effects in an
  area or by being targeted as multiple creatures.

- **Now or Never.** All HP, ST, Spell Points, and usages of other
  features are shared by your past self and your present self.

- **Retroaction.** Your past self may take up to three actions that your
  present self would be able to take, but you must expend one lightspeed
  charge for each action taken in this manner.

- **Back to the Past.** Your past self disappears at the end of their
  turn.

## Foreknowledge

*Your hazy premonitions are in search of your future, but you could just
make one instead.*

At 1st Rank, you learn the **Foreknowledge** lightform described below:

### Foreknowledge

Timetorn Evincer Lightform

Immediately before you make a weapon attack check, you may expend a
lightspeed charge to gain advantage on the check.

## Isochronic Reprisal

*Make good use of your time, even time-travel time.*

At 4th Rank, when you use **Vergence** while waiting for your past self
to appear after using **Temporal Jaunt**, you may choose not to
teleport. If you do, vergence effects still trigger as if you had
teleported and as a vergence effect, you may remove one of the actions
that will be granted by the **Retroaction** trait of **Temporal Jaunt**
to immediately take an action of your choosing as if you were located in
an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target ally.

## Paradoxical Loophole

*If you line up the timelines just right, maybe the universe won't
notice.*

At 8th Rank, if your present self and your past self use the same
lightform at the same time, you expend the lightspeed charge cost once
instead of twice.
